description_long: This is a thick paperback book with a slightly worn and creased cover, featuring a dark, mostly black front with a vertical rectangular panel in a lighter, brownish hue. The edges of the pages are visibly uneven and aged, giving the book a well-used appearance. The front cover displays a metallic or embossed effect on some of the text and design elements, adding a subtle sheen. The spine is black with vertical text and a small white label at the top, while the back cover contains a barcode and additional text. The book's pages are yellowed, and the overall form is rectangular with a soft, flexible cover. The object is compact and portable, suitable for being carried or placed on urban surfaces like benches or sidewalks.
description: A thick, worn paperback book with a dark cover, metallic accents, and yellowed, uneven pages. The cover features a vertical brown panel and embossed details.
description_view_0: The front cover is visible, showing a dark background with a vertical brown panel and metallic or embossed text.
description_view_1: The book is seen from an angle, highlighting the uneven, yellowed page edges and the thickness of the volume.
description_view_2: The back and side of the book are visible, showing the barcode, additional text, and the rough, aged page edges.
description_view_3: The back cover is fully visible, featuring a barcode, a white label, and more text, with the spine and page block also in view.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a vertical rectangular panel in a brownish hue, set against a dark background. There are no visible illustrations or artwork, only abstract color blocking and metallic effects.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is black with vertically oriented white text and a small white label at the top. The design is simple, with no decorative patterns or illustrations.
